texto: Never choose a situation which is a burden to your command only to satisfy fellows' standards
autor: rather choose a situation that may be difficult but is compliment to your will.
explicacao: Citação de rather choose a situation that may be difficult but is compliment to your will. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Never choose a situation which is a burden to your command only to satisfy fellows' standards” articula reflexao, joe-mari-fadrigalan, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
